name: extract-method-to-private-methods
description: TRIGGER CONDITIONS: A method defines multiple closures over 3+ captured variables, closures use `nonlocal`, or closure RuntimeError guards are untestable in isolation. Use when: (1) extracting inline action closures into private `_action_*` instance methods, (2) replacing `nonlocal x` with a mutable-box `x_ref: list[T] = [x]` pattern, (3) slimming a builder method down to a return dict + lambdas. Key gotcha: assert patch.object mocks INSIDE the `with` block, not after it exits.
